name: Ella Turen

sheet.name: Ella Turen
sheet.background_story:
Ella is a brave crusader. Coming from a highly religious family. All she has known is blessings from mother agora. She pledges her sword to her. She has been honed in on several skills.. One of them known as the "flash step".

They survived the first night. She was glad she decided to pack a blueberry pop-tart. She had a couple sips left of a G2 Gatorade to quench her undesirable thirst for glory in the eyes of her.

They say their prayers and take shelter with an encampment preparing for the next war. She doesn't feel confident she will make it out alive, but knows its a blessing to die in the light of Agora.

Ella  lost her battle at the ecnampment.
